title: hieracium viride subsp. penninicola
intro: Hieracium viride subsp. penninicola is a plant species within the dandelion-like genus Hieracium, specifically a subspecies of the green hawk's beard plant native to the UK. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and promoting digestion, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, but its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
